title: Synthetic Thoughtful Loop
creator: XinOne project
generation: uv run python tools/sound/sfx_generator.py --input-file scores/shared-thoughtful-bgm.mml --style sine --track-file scores/shared-thoughtful-bgm-bass.mml --track-style sine --fm --fm-ratio 0.5 --fm-index 1.0 --attack 0.01 --decay 0.1 --sustain 0.6 --release 0.2 --volume 0.85 -o output/bgm/thoughtful (44.1 kHz); then resample to 22.05 kHz mono 16-bit PCM via scipy.signal.resample_poly(audio, up=1, down=2) and scale peak to ~0.82.
